legal.contactLead: If you have any questions, contact us:

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These terms govern the use of the rentmi.uz platform and the Rentmi mobile app. By using the platform you agree to the terms below.

sections.p: Rentmi is an online platform connecting homeowners and tenants. We provide tools for publishing listings, sending rental requests, signing contracts online and communicating between the parties. Rentmi is not a party to the rental relationship — the contract is concluded between the owner and the tenant.

Full use of the platform requires registration with your phone number. You are responsible for the security of your account and for the actions performed through it. Your information must be accurate and up to date.
All listings are moderated before publication. Listings containing false, misleading or unlawful information are rejected or removed. The author of a listing is responsible for its content.

The platform operates a consent-based scoring system. Scoring results are intended to give owners a general view of a tenant's reliability; the final decision is always made by the parties themselves.
Using the platform for fraud, misleading other users, sending spam, interfering with the system or any other unlawful purpose is prohibited. Violations may lead to account restriction or suspension.
The platform is provided "as is". We strive to keep the service available at all times, but we are not liable for indirect damages caused by technical failures or the actions of third parties.
We reserve the right to update these terms. We will announce significant changes via the platform or the app. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how the rentmi.uz platform and the Rentmi mobile app collect, use and protect your personal data.

sections.p: At registration we collect your phone number, name and profile details. During identity verification (MyID) and scoring — only with your consent — the relevant identification and solvency data is processed.
Collected data is used to provide the service, manage listings, conclude contracts, ensure security and improve service quality. We do not sell your data to third parties for advertising purposes.
Data may be shared only with partners required to operate the service (identification, payment and SMS providers) and with state authorities in cases provided by law.
Data is stored on servers protected by modern technical and organisational measures. Account access is granted only via a one-time SMS code.
You may request access to, correction or deletion of your data, and withdraw your scoring consent at any time. To do so, contact us using the details below.
The site uses cookies to remember your language choice and session. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but some site features may become unavailable.

payment.title: Payment and Refunds
payment.intro: This page describes how payments and refunds work on the rentmi.uz platform.

sections.p: Payments are processed through payment systems licensed in Uzbekistan — Uzum, Click, Payme and Atmos. Your payment details (card number, etc.) are not stored on Rentmi servers and are processed directly by the payment provider.

Registration and browsing listings are free. Certain additional services — such as listing promotion or professional photography — may be paid. The price of every paid service is clearly shown before payment.

Rental payments are made under the contract between the owner and the tenant. The platform simplifies the payment process, but agreements on the rental amount remain the mutual responsibility of the parties.

If a paid service was not delivered due to a technical failure, the payment is refunded in full. Refund requests are accepted within 10 business days of payment; once reviewed, funds are returned via the same payment method.
Approved refunds are typically processed within 3 to 14 business days, depending on the payment provider.
If you experience a payment issue, keep your receipt and contact us using the details below — we review every case individually.

items.1: Through Rentmi I found a great home within just a few days. The process was very transparent and easy — all the paperwork was done online. Talking to the owner was convenient too, and I moved in without any hassle. Now I happily recommend it to my friends.
items.2: Thanks to the scoring system, the owner trusted me very quickly. Finding a rental used to take weeks; with Rentmi everything was sorted in a single day. Payments and the contract are in the app too — very convenient and well organized.
items.3: I signed the contract online and didn't have to go anywhere. Support answered every question quickly and clearly. I didn't expect this level of service — it's genuinely excellent.

items.1: *8 useful features* of *Rentmi* you didn't know

1.q: What if the owner evicts me before the term ends?
1.a: The contract terms protect both parties; disputes are resolved through Rentmi support.

2.a: Registration and browsing listings are free. Some additional services may be paid.

3.q: How can I improve my score?
3.a: Verify your data via MyID and IHamkor and complete your rental history.

4.q: Is signing the contract online safe?
4.a: Yes, all signatures are legally binding via electronic digital signature.

5.a: Payments go through the platform in a secure, protected payment system.

og.description: No fake listings, verified homes and scored users. See how Rentmi works.

hero.title: Finding and renting out a home is no longer a problem.
hero.subtitle: We’re a modern rental platform connecting tenants and owners safely, quickly and conveniently. No more spending hours searching for a home or posting a listing.

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: Why did we build Rentmi?
story.p1: For years, the home-rental market in Uzbekistan has been an inconvenient and disorganized process. People searching for a home often face unverified listings, inaccurate information, time-consuming conversations and unreliable sources.
story.p2: And owners struggle to reach the right audience with their property quickly. We saw this problem and decided to build a modern solution.
story.p3: Our goal is to make the home-rental process in Uzbekistan simple, transparent and trustworthy.

problemSolution.title: Problem & Solution
problemSolution.subtitle: A modern answer to old frustrations

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: To digitize Uzbekistan’s home-rental market and create a safe, transparent and convenient ecosystem for users.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.body: To become the most trusted and convenient rental platform in Central Asia.
